mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_account_id AS userAccountId, o.customer_id AS customerId, o.pet_id AS petId, o.service_item_id AS serviceItemId, o.emp_id AS empId, o.service_time AS serviceTime, o.service_end_time AS serviceEndTime, o.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, o.status AS status, o.rating AS rating, o.`comment` AS comment, o.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime
mapper.insert: insert into `order` (order_no, user_account_id, customer_id, pet_id, service_item_id, emp_id, service_time, service_end_time, duration_minutes, status) values (#{orderNo}, #{userAccountId}, #{customerId}, #{petId}, #{serviceItemId}, #{empId}, #{serviceTime}, #{serviceEndTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{status})
mapper.update: update `order` set service_time = #{serviceTime}, service_end_time = #{serviceEndTime}, emp_id = #{empId}, pet_id = #{petId}, service_item_id = #{serviceItemId}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes} where id = #{id}
